# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
    GITLAB_HOST: $CI_SERVER_URL # GitLab host address
    DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT: $K8S_CLUSTER # Kubernetes cluster name
    RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.txt" # Release notes file path
  stages:
    - build
    - test
    - deploy
    - release
    - notify
  dependencies:
    build: [""]
    test: ["build"]
    deploy: ["test"]
    release: ["deploy"]
    notify: ["release"]

stages:
  variables:
    GITLAB_HOST: $CI_SERVER_URL # GitLab host address
    DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT: $K8S_CLUSTER # Kubernetes cluster name
    RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.txt" # Release notes file path
  stages:
    - build
    - test
    - deploy
    - release
    - notify
  dependencies:
    build: [""]
    test: ["build"]
    deploy: ["test"]
    release: ["deploy"]
    notify: ["release"]

.merge_request_event:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE != null && ($CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION == null || $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION.size() > 0) # only execute for merge requests with a title or description
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE != null && ($CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE == null || $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE.size() > 0) # only execute for commits with a title or message

build:
  stage: build
  tags:
    - "${DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - target/
  only:
    - master

test:
  stage: test
  tags:
    - "${DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
  script:
    - echo "Testing application..."
  dependencies:
    - build
  only:
    - master

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  tags:
    - "${DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
  script:
    - echo "Deploying application to ${DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}..."
  dependencies:
    - test
  only:
    - master

release:
  stage: release
  tags:
    - "${DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
  script:
    - echo "Creating release for ${GITLAB_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH} ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
  dependencies:
    - deploy
  only:
    - master

notify:
  stage: notify
  tags:
    - "${DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT}"
  script:
    - echo "Notifying stakeholders of release..."
  dependencies:
    - release
  only:
    - master
